name: Aurora Borealis
description: GPU-rendered aurora borealis with simplex noise height fields, vertical streaks, and 3-color gradient ramp

name: Balatro
description: Psychedelic domain-warped pattern inspired by the card game Balatro — 4-layer sin/cos distortion mapped to a smooth color gradient

name: Ballpit
description: Soft-edged metaball blobs that merge organically with mouse repulsion

name: Beams
description: WebGL light beams radiating from a focal point with layered rotation and bloom glow

name: Color Bends
description: Flowing color bands that bend and weave like ribbons using parametric curves and smooth distance fields

name: Dark Veil
description: Multiple semi-transparent dark gradient fog layers with CSS drift animations and mouse-driven parallax displacement

name: Dither
description: Ordered dithering with 8x8 Bayer matrix applied to animated noise fields for a retro/analog aesthetic

name: Dot Grid
description: Interactive dot grid with proximity glow, displacement, connection lines, and spatial grid optimization

name: Evil Eye
description: Concentric pulsing iris with radial fibers and a pupil that smoothly tracks the cursor

name: Faulty Terminal
description: Matrix-like falling characters on a CRT display with scanlines, glitch blocks, and horizontal tears

name: Flickering Grid
description: WebGL grid of independently flickering squares with mouse-reactive flicker acceleration

name: Floating Lines
description: Gently floating diagonal lines that drift across the screen with soft gradient edges

name: Galaxy
description: Spiral galaxy with log-spiral arms, scattered stars, color temperature gradient, and nebula dust

name: Gradient Blinds
description: Horizontal venetian blinds with staggered gradient animations — each strip shifts at a different speed and direction

name: Gradient Mesh
description: WebGL animated mesh gradient with 5 smooth color blobs, organic motion, and film grain overlay

name: Grainient
description: Beautiful multi-color gradient with layered organic noise grain — flowing, not flat — rendered via WebGL simplex noise

name: Grid Distortion
description: WebGL wireframe grid with noise-based displacement, mouse distortion bubble, and glowing intersections

name: Grid Motion
description: Rows of rounded rectangles that shift horizontally based on mouse X position with inertia — different rows at different speeds

name: Grid Scan
description: Uniform grid with a horizontal scanning line that illuminates cells as it passes — glow fades over configurable duration

name: Hyperspeed
description: WebGL hyperspace speed lines with radial streaks, noise-modulated width, and bloom glow

name: Iridescence
description: GPU-rendered iridescent holographic color shift using iterative cosine accumulation with mouse-reactive UV shift

name: Letter Glitch
description: Screen filled with random ASCII characters overlaid by randomly appearing colored glitch blocks — cyberpunk hacker aesthetic

name: Light Pillar
description: Vertical light beam with Gaussian glow, noise-flickering edges, volumetric rays, and sparkle particles

name: Light Rays
description: WebGL volumetric god-ray effect with radial light accumulation and floating dust particles

name: Line Waves
description: 20-30 horizontal sine wave lines stacked vertically, each with different phase and amplitude — smooth and mesmerizing

name: Liquid Chrome
description: GPU-rendered liquid chrome with iterative sine wave domain distortion, mouse-reactive ripple, and 3x3 supersampling

name: Liquid Ether
description: Organic fluid-like patterns using FBM with rotation between octaves and mouse warp

name: Noise
description: WebGL animated film grain with scanlines, chromatic aberration, and organic texture

name: Orb
description: Large soft-edge gradient sphere with multiple color layers, breathing animation, and mouse parallax

name: Particles Constellation
description: Perlin noise-driven particle constellation with connection lines and mouse repulsion

name: Pixel Blast
description: Hundreds of small pixel squares exploding outward from center and reforming in a continuous looping cycle

name: Pixel Snow
description: Falling square pixel snow particles with horizontal wind drift and realistic accumulation at the bottom edge

name: Plasma
description: 3D volumetric raymarching through a plasma field with torus-like SDF and sin/cos domain warping

name: Prism
description: Light refraction and dispersion through a rotating prism with chromatic aberration and rainbow bands

name: Prismatic Burst
description: Prismatic light burst with 12-band spectral chromatic aberration — each wavelength refracts at a different angle creating rainbow halos

name: Radar
description: Radar sweep effect with concentric rings, rotating sweep line, and blips that fade after being revealed

name: Ripple Grid
description: Grid of dots with click-spawned ripple waves that propagate outward, displacing dot size and brightness

name: Shape Grid
description: Grid of geometric shapes (circle, square, triangle, diamond) that rotate, scale, and glow near the cursor with a fading trail

name: Silk
description: GPU-rendered flowing silk with layered rotated sine patterns and film grain noise

name: Soft Aurora
description: Soft, diffuse aurora with FBM noise and gentle pastel gradient transitions

name: Spotlight
description: Cursor-following spotlight with dual glow, grid reveal via CSS mask, and smooth tracking

name: Threads
description: Flowing lines with Perlin noise displacement converging at a cursor-influenced point

name: Warp Background
description: WebGL 3D starfield with layered depth, speed streaks, and motion trails

name: Waves
description: Multi-layered Perlin noise waves with gradient fills, bezier curves, and sheen highlights

name: Border Beam
description: Animated beam of light traveling along the border path in a continuous loop.

name: Border Trail
description: Glowing trail that follows the border path with a fading tail.

name: Electric Border
description: Electric/lightning crackling border effect with jagged energy arcs along the perimeter.

name: Glow Border
description: Soft glowing border that pulses with adjustable intensity, color, and speed.

name: Hover Border Gradient
description: Border gradient that shifts and rotates on hover, transitioning from subtle to vivid.

name: Moving Border
description: A visible border segment that moves around the perimeter in a continuous loop.

name: Shine Border
description: Moving shine/highlight traveling along border, like light reflecting on a chrome edge.

name: Star Border
description: Border with animated star/sparkle particles that float along the perimeter.

name: Animated Border Button
description: Button with animated rotating gradient border that spins continuously.

name: Glow Button
description: Button with pulsing/breathing glow effect that intensifies on hover.

name: Liquid Button
description: Liquid/gooey morphing button with SVG filter distortion on hover.

name: Magnetic Button
description: Button pulls toward cursor when nearby, creating a magnetic attraction effect.

name: Rainbow Button
description: Animated rainbow gradient border and background that continuously shifts colors.

name: Ripple Button
description: Material-design ripple effect emanating from click point with configurable color and speed.

name: Shimmer Button
description: Animated shimmer/shine sweep continuously traveling across button surface.

name: Shiny Button
description: Metallic shine sweep across button on hover, like light reflecting off a polished surface.

name: 3D Tilt Card
description: Card tilts in 3D following cursor with depth layers, shine and shadow.

name: Card Stack
description: Stacked cards that fan out on hover or scroll into view with staggered animation.

name: Evervault Card
description: Card with matrix-like random character grid background that reacts to cursor proximity.

name: Expandable Cards
description: Cards that expand smoothly to full detail view on click using FLIP animation technique.

name: Flip Card
description: Card that flips 180 degrees in 3D to reveal backside content on hover or click.

name: Glare Card
description: Card with glossy glare overlay that moves with cursor, simulating a polished glass surface.

name: Glass Card
description: Frosted glass card with backdrop blur, subtle border glow, and animated gradient on hover.

name: Magic Card
description: Card with radial gradient spotlight that follows cursor, creating a magical glow effect on the surface.

name: Neon Gradient Card
description: Card with animated neon gradient border that rotates continuously and intensifies on hover.

name: Reflective Card
description: Card with reflective sheen that moves with cursor, simulating a holographic foil effect.

name: Spotlight Card
description: Spotlight glow follows cursor over card surface with soft radial light.

name: Accordion
description: Smooth animated accordion with auto-height transitions and rotating chevron icons.

name: Carousel
description: Smooth carousel with drag support, dot indicators, and arrow navigation. Touch-friendly.

name: Circular Gallery
description: 3D circular gallery of images that rotates on drag or button click.

name: Counter
description: Animated counter display with rolling digit animation like an odometer.

name: Dock
description: macOS-style dock with magnification on hover. Items scale up based on cursor proximity.

name: Elastic Slider
description: Range slider with elastic/bouncy snap behavior and animated fill.

name: FAQ
description: FAQ accordion with smooth height animations and plus/minus toggle icons.

name: Floating Dock
description: Floating action dock fixed at the bottom with smooth hover interactions.

name: Flowing Menu
description: Menu items with flowing/magnetic hover effect where a highlight follows the active item.

name: Modal
description: Modal dialog with smooth open/close animation and blurred backdrop.

name: Pricing Table
description: Animated pricing table with monthly/yearly toggle and highlighted recommended plan.

name: Tabs
description: Animated tabs with sliding indicator and smooth content transitions.

name: Testimonial Slider
description: Testimonial carousel with avatars, quotes, and smooth crossfade transitions.

name: Tooltip
description: Animated tooltip with smart positioning that adjusts to viewport boundaries.

name: Animated Beam
description: SVG beam connecting two points with animated dash pattern and glow effect.

name: Blob Cursor
description: Large soft gradient blob that follows cursor with smooth elastic easing, creating a liquid-like ambient effect.

name: Confetti
description: Colorful confetti burst animation triggered on click or automatically. Canvas-based with physics simulation.

name: Cursor Trail
description: Glowing particle trail that follows the cursor with fading afterglow. Canvas-based for high performance.

name: Following Pointer
description: Element that smoothly follows cursor with spring physics, creating a natural bouncy motion.

name: Meteors
description: Meteor streaks flying across the screen at an angle with glowing trails. Pure CSS animation.

name: Orbiting Circles
description: Circles orbiting around a center point at different radii and speeds. Pure CSS animation.

name: Pointer Highlight
description: Radial gradient highlight centered on cursor position, creating a subtle spotlight effect on the page background.

name: Sparkles
description: Twinkling sparkle particles that appear and fade across a container with randomized positions and timing.

name: Animated List
description: List items animate in with stagger effect on scroll, sliding up with fade.

name: Bento Grid
description: Animated bento-box grid layout with staggered reveal animation on scroll.

name: Infinite Slider
description: Infinite horizontal scrolling content with smooth seamless looping.

name: Magic Bento
description: Bento grid cards with spotlight hover effect that illuminates card borders on cursor proximity.

name: Marquee
description: Smooth infinite marquee text scrolling horizontally. Pure CSS animation.

name: Masonry
description: Animated masonry grid layout with staggered scroll-triggered reveal animations.

name: Timeline
description: Animated vertical timeline with entries that reveal on scroll with a growing line.

name: 3D Marquee
description: 3D perspective marquee of images/cards that scroll continuously with depth and rotation effects.

name: Glare Hover
description: Image or card with glossy reflective glare effect that moves with cursor on hover.

name: Hero Video Dialog
description: Video thumbnail that expands into a full-screen modal dialog with smooth animation.

name: Image Comparison
description: Drag slider to compare two images side by side with a smooth divider line.

name: Image Hover Parallax
description: Image shifts with subtle 3D parallax tilt on hover, responding to cursor position.

name: Images Slider
description: Horizontal image slider with smooth transitions, navigation arrows, and dot indicators.

name: Lens Zoom
description: Magnifying lens effect on hover over an image, showing a zoomed-in circular area following the cursor.

name: Progressive Blur
description: Content blurs progressively from edge, creating a depth-of-field effect. Pure CSS with layered backdrops.

name: Before After Slider
description: Drag slider to compare two states side by side with a draggable divider.

name: Cards Cascade
description: Cards that cascade into view from alternating sides as the user scrolls, with stagger and overlap creating a dynamic, energetic feel.

name: Clip Path Reveal
description: Content reveals through animated clip-path on scroll, creating dramatic unveiling transitions.

name: Container Scroll
description: Container transforms (scale, rotate, perspective) based on scroll position, creating immersive 3D scroll effects.

name: Horizontal Scroll
description: Section scrolls horizontally while the page scrolls vertically, creating a cinematic panel experience.

name: Image Sequence Scrub
description: Scrub through a sequence of procedurally generated frames on a canvas based on scroll position, like a video controlled by scroll.

name: Macbook Scroll
description: Product showcase where an image transforms (scales down, rotates in 3D) as the user scrolls, revealing content below. Inspired by Apple product pages.

name: Morphing Sections
description: Sections that morph shape via clip-path transitions as you scroll between them, creating organic flowing boundaries.

name: Number Counter Scroll
description: Numbers count up when their section scrolls into view, perfect for statistics and metrics sections.

name: Parallax Hero Images
description: Hero section with multiple element layers at different parallax speeds creating a depth illusion as the user scrolls.

name: Parallax Layers
description: Multiple layers moving at different speeds on scroll, creating depth and immersion.

name: Pin and Reveal
description: Section pins in place while content reveals and animates within it, creating a storytelling scroll experience.

name: Reveal on Scroll
description: Elements reveal with various animations (slide-up, slide-left, fade, scale, rotate) as they enter the viewport, configurable per-element with data attributes.

name: Scale on Scroll
description: Elements scale up or down based on scroll position, creating zoom and focus effects.

name: Scroll Progress
description: Progress bar at top of page showing scroll position with smooth animation and customizable appearance.

name: Scroll Snap Sections
description: Full-page sections with smooth CSS snap scrolling. Each section animates in as it becomes active.

name: Scroll Video Sync
description: A video-like experience driven by scroll. Canvas draws animated content synced to scroll position with a progress bar.

name: Stagger Grid Reveal
description: Grid items animate in with staggered timing as they enter the viewport using IntersectionObserver.

name: Sticky Cards Stack
description: Cards stack on top of each other as you scroll, creating a layered deck effect with depth.

name: Sticky Scroll Reveal
description: Sticky sidebar with content that changes on scroll, ideal for feature showcases and documentation-style layouts.

name: SVG Draw on Scroll
description: SVG paths draw progressively as you scroll, creating hand-drawn illustration effects.

name: Text Highlight on Scroll
description: Words in paragraphs progressively highlight as the user scrolls past them, creating a reading-like scroll experience.

name: Timeline Scroll
description: Animated timeline that draws and fills as user scrolls. Center line grows, nodes appear with content cards alternating left and right.

name: Tracing Beam
description: A beam/line that draws along the page as you scroll, connecting content sections with a visual thread.

name: Blur Text
description: Text appears from blur to sharp, staggered per character.

name: Counting Number
description: Animates numbers counting up from 0 to target value on scroll into view.

name: Glitch Text
description: Digital glitch/corruption effect on text with chromatic aberration and noise.

name: Gradient Text
description: Animated gradient flowing through text. Pure CSS.

name: Morphing Text
description: Smoothly morphs between different words or phrases using blur transitions.

name: Rotating Text
description: Rotates/cycles through words with slide, fade, or flip animation.

name: Scroll Reveal
description: Text elements animate in staggered fashion as you scroll into view with multiple animation presets.

name: Scroll Velocity
description: Text moves horizontally as a marquee that speeds up with scroll velocity.

name: Shimmer Text
description: Shimmering highlight sweeps across text. Pure CSS.

name: Shiny Text
description: Text with a metallic/shiny sweep animation. Pure CSS.

name: Sparkles Text
description: Text with animated sparkle particles floating around it.

name: Split Text
description: Splits text into characters or words and animates each individually with stagger.

name: Text Generate
description: Text appears word by word with a typing/generation effect, like AI generating text.

name: Text Reveal
description: Text reveals with a sliding mask/wipe effect that sweeps across to uncover text.

name: Text Scramble
description: Scrambles and decodes text with random characters before revealing the final text.

name: Typewriter
description: Types text character by character with blinking cursor, supports delete and retype loop.

name: Color Wipe
description: Full color wipe transition between sections using animated pseudo-elements that sweep across the viewport.

name: Curtain Reveal
description: Curtain opening effect revealing the next section as two panels slide apart on scroll.

name: Diagonal Reveal
description: Diagonal wipe transition between sections using CSS clip-path polygons that reveal content at an angle.

name: Section Clip Path
description: Section transitions with animated clip-path shapes — circles, diamonds, and angular cuts between sections.

name: Wave Divider
description: Animated SVG wave between sections, creating fluid organic transitions with continuous motion.

name: Zoom Through
description: Zoom into an element to transition to the next section, creating a fly-through spatial navigation effect.
